title: neottia nanchuanica
intro: Neottia nanchuanica, also known as the Nanchuan Orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to China, belonging to the genus Neottia and family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Neottia nanchuanica has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to boost the immune system and alleviate various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Neottia nanchuanica is typically processed into a decoction or an infusion, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
